race.description: Spelling At Domeland Provincial Mdn Plate
race.comment: OAKFIELD IOWA (8) has not raced since an eye-catching debut over 1150m at the Beaumont track in December, charging home late to get up for third. Recent trial winner who looks all set to pick up where she left off. GRAND CAROUSEL (7) made late ground but was no match for the winner when resuming over this distance at Nowra last time out. Draws the fence and the winkers go on for the first time so there are a couple of reasons she can improve enough to take this out. YESZEM (10) had an interrupted passage in the run home and could have finished a bit closer over this trip at Kembla a fortnight ago. Nicely drawn and should figure in the finish. STABILITY (5) was ridden a little quieter last Saturday and did a fair job to finish just two lengths from the winner over today's journey at Newcastle. Worth considering on the quick back-up. BOBBY (1) was never in hunt over 900m at Newcastle last weekend but he can improve out to this trip.
